name: pqy-wechat
description: PQY 微信自动化中间层

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:engine"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../engine && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../engine && pytest
